repo_prior_art.cite: No non-parent CausalSmith ExactID/PartialID catalogue entry; parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1 had one cumulant margin, not a three-diagnostic object.

published_prior_art.cite: Read2022 sign/zero algorithms; Guay2021 higher-moment rank/tests; no unified sign-paste-cumulant diagnostic.

repo_prior_art.cite: No non-parent duplicate; parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1 assumed chi_w(P)>0 rather than decomposing it.

published_prior_art.cite: PMW2021 LP/VAR common-restriction equivalence; LMS2017/GMR2017 non-Gaussian SVAR identification; DW2023 independence-refined VAR sets; none gives the multiplicative mechanism support lower bound.

repo_prior_art.cite: No non-parent duplicate; parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1 did not state a three-channel iff frontier.

published_prior_art.cite: PMW2021 common-restriction zero-gap endpoint and GMR2017/LMS2017 non-Gaussian label endpoint do not subsume this iff support-function frontier.

repo_prior_art.cite: parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1 cumulant-envelope loss chi_w(P); expected parent similarity under upgrade mode.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: E_w^{sign}(P)=inf_{r in M_w^H} min_{a:(Ar)_a>0}(Ar)_a can be undefined when a maximizer has no strictly positive sign row; the assumption only guarantees one slack exposed maximizer, not all maximizers.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The zero-channel clause says every horizonwise support maximizer has a same-response common-impact or cumulant representative, but the diagnostics are infima over argmax sets, so a zero value only witnesses at least one optimizer unless the definitions are strengthened.

soundness_flags.label: Sanity-check corollaries
soundness_flags.one_line: The PMW reduction asserts Pi_w^{paste}=0 and Delta_w^H=0 when restrictions are removed or imposed equally, but with the current HLP definition horizonwise q_h choices need not equal the common-impact set unless the LP side is explicitly redefined to impose the same common-impact object.

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The revision genuinely changes the parent one-margin chi_w(P) into named sign-exposure, common-impact-pasting, and cumulant-label channels with an explicit parent-collapse corollary.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Redefine E_w^{sign} using nonredundant sign rows and a convention for empty active-positive rows, or restrict M_w^H so every exposed maximizer has positive slack.

Replace the infimum-based zero-channel iff clause with setwise conditions, e.g. all support maximizers have zero distance to the relevant nested set, or weaken the conclusion to existence of an attaining representative.

Make the PMW sanity reduction a literal specialization by defining a common-restriction LP set R_HLP^{common}=R_CLP, then state the zero-gap result for that set rather than the original horizonwise relaxation.

recommended_next_step: Patch the three statement-level well-posedness issues without changing the mechanism kernel, then rerun novelty review.
